home.recent.title: Recent Records
landing.footer.tagline: The family-first, vernacular health-record vault for India. Private by design.
landing.footer.disclaimer: Not a medical device. Information only, not medical advice.
landing.hero.headline: Every family health record, in one calm place.
landing.hero.description: Snap a prescription or lab report — SehatVault reads it, organises it into each member's timeline, and keeps it private. Built for Indian families managing care across generations and borders.
landing.hero.trust: Encrypted, stored in India, only you can see it.
landing.hero.media_alt: A person scanning a medical report with their phone at home.
landing.problem.heading: Health records shouldn't live in a plastic bag.
landing.problem.description: For most Indian families, years of care are stored as loose paper and forwarded photos — easy to lose, impossible to read at a glance.
landing.problem.pain_1: Reports scattered across plastic bags, WhatsApp chats, and drawers.
landing.problem.pain_2: Nobody remembers which medicine, which dose, or what changed since last time.
landing.problem.pain_3: The scramble to find the right paper minutes before a doctor's appointment.
landing.how.heading: From paper pile to clear timeline in three steps.
landing.how.step_1.title: Capture
landing.how.step_1.body: Snap, upload, or forward a report — camera, gallery, or PDF. It's stored encrypted in seconds.
landing.how.step_2.title: Auto-organise
landing.how.step_2.body: AI reads each document, files it under the right member, and extracts lab values into a clear timeline.
landing.how.step_3.title: Share
landing.how.step_3.body: One tap creates a secure, time-limited link for a doctor. It expires automatically and logs every view.
landing.features.heading: A calm home for your family's health.
landing.features.timeline.title: A timeline for every member
landing.features.timeline.body: Each person — Amma's BP, your thyroid, your child's vaccines — gets their own clear, chronological health story. No more guessing what came before.
landing.features.trends.title: Lab-value trends
landing.features.trends.body: Watch HbA1c, BP, TSH and more move over time — with plain-language status, never colour alone.
landing.features.share.title: Doctor share & QR
landing.features.share.body: Share securely with a scoped link or QR that expires automatically and logs access.
landing.features.reminders.title: Medicine reminders
landing.features.reminders.body: Gentle nudges for doses and refills, so nothing slips through the cracks.
landing.features.ask.title: Ask your records
landing.features.ask.body: Ask a question in plain language and get answers with citations.
landing.privacy.heading: Your family's health data stays yours.
landing.privacy.description: Privacy isn't a setting we added later — it's the foundation. Consent, encryption, and an audit trail are built into every screen.
landing.privacy.encrypted.title: Encrypted & stored in India
landing.privacy.encrypted.body: AES-256 at rest in an ap-south-1 region, delivered only over short-lived secure links.
landing.privacy.only_you.title: Only you can see this
landing.privacy.only_you.body: Strict per-family isolation means no one — not even another family — can read your records.
landing.privacy.expiry.title: Visible expiry & access log
landing.privacy.expiry.body: Every doctor-share shows when it expires, and every view is recorded in an audit trail.
landing.privacy.export.title: Export & delete anytime
landing.privacy.export.body: Your data is yours. Export everything or delete your account in a tap — no buried settings.
landing.pricing.heading: Start free. Upgrade when your family grows.
landing.pricing.description: Launching free for every family. A Family Plus plan — NRI-friendly — is on the way.
landing.pricing.free.name: Free
landing.pricing.free.tagline: Everything a family needs to get organised.
landing.pricing.plus.name: Family Plus
landing.pricing.plus.tagline: More space and priority AI for growing families.
landing.cta.heading: Bring your family's health records home.
landing.cta.description: Set up your private vault in minutes. Free to start, no card needed.
